channel.title: Posts on Scott Knight
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Scott Knight

item.title: Time for an update
item.description: Earlier this week I participated as a panelist in a new event series called called Mintor Lounge, which was hosted by my startup Mintor in partnership with Startup Grind - Baton Rouge. The idea behind the event series is to foster a live, exclusive place for intimate conversation and connection among entrepreneurs in the Baton Rouge area. This inaugural Lounge event was titled “Fearless Self-Branding”, and took the form of a roundtable conversation among the panelists.
